hero.headline: Dallas’s Premier Auto Repair – Quality You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, our ASE-certified technicians deliver honest, professional service every time.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: Whether you need a simple oil change, brake repair, or a full engine overhaul, our team has the expertise and equipment to get you back on the road safely. We service all makes and models with precision and care.
bullets: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our commitment to integrity has earned us a loyal customer base across Dallas.

featureSections.title: Advanced Diagnostics & Engine Repair
featureSections.body: From check engine lights to major engine work, we use the latest diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. Save time and money with our efficient repair process.
featureSections.cardBody: Our team holds ASE certifications and participates in continuous education to stay ahead of the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Decades of Experience
whyChooseUs.description: With over 35 years in the industry, we’ve seen it all. Our seasoned mechanics bring unmatched knowledge to every job, big or small.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Communication
whyChooseUs.description: We explain every repair in plain English and provide detailed estimates before any work begins. No surprises, just honest service.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Workmanship
whyChooseUs.description: We use only high-quality OEM and aftermarket parts, backed by solid warranties. Our work is guaranteed to last.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Dallas Location
whyChooseUs.description: Easily accessible near I-35 and I-45, we offer quick turnaround times and a comfortable waiting area. Free shuttle service available.

testimonials.quote: I’ve been bringing my cars to R&B for over 10 years. They’re honest, fair, and always do great work. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike D.

testimonials.quote: Diagnosed my transmission issue correctly on the first try. Saved me from an expensive dealership quote. Will be back for sure.
testimonials.author: Lisa T.

testimonials.quote: Fast, professional, and fair pricing. They even called to check on my car after the repair. That’s service you don’t see anymore.
testimonials.author: James K.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience the R&B Difference?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online to book your appointment today.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, R & B Automotive offers a full spectrum of auto services in Dallas, TX. Our certified technicians use advanced tools and genuine parts to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

services.title: Oil Change & Lube Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes using premium oils and filters.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the single most important maintenance item for your vehicle. At R & B Automotive, we use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils and premium filters to protect your engine. Our quick lube service gets you in and out fast without sacrificing thoroughness.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves performance
Includes multi-point inspection for added peace of mind
Uses OEM-recommended oil grades and filters
Environmentally responsible disposal of used oil

process.title: Initial Check
process.description: We verify your vehicle’s make, model, and mileage to recommend the right oil type and filter.

process.title: Drain & Fill
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with fresh oil to manufacturer specifications.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We check fluid levels, tire pressure, and belts, then provide a report of your vehicle’s condition.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner’s manual or ask our technicians for a personalized schedule.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic oil changes. We’ll recommend the best option for your car and driving habits.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with expert brake inspections, pad replacement, and rotor resurfacing.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle’s most critical safety system. Our brake service includes a thorough inspection of pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid. We use premium components to ensure quiet, smooth, and reliable stopping power. Whether you hear squeaking or feel vibrations, we’ll diagnose and fix the issue promptly.
benefits: Enhanced safety for you and your passengers
Free brake inspection with any service

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, check rotor condition, and inspect calipers and brake lines.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: We replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors, and flush brake fluid if needed.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: After service, we test drive your vehicle to ensure brakes are responsive and quiet.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, vibrations when braking, or a dashboard warning light. If you notice any of these, bring your car in for a free inspection.

faqs.question: How long do brake pads typically last?
faqs.answer: Brake pad lifespan varies from 25,000 to 65,000 miles depending on driving habits and conditions. We’ll check them during every visit.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for check engine lights and performance issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn’t performing as it should, trust R & B Automotive to find the root cause. We use advanced diagnostic scanners and years of experience to identify issues quickly. From sensor replacements to major engine overhauls, we deliver reliable repairs that restore your vehicle’s performance.
benefits: Pinpoint accuracy saves time and money
Comprehensive system checks beyond just codes

process.title: Code Reading & Analysis
process.description: We connect our diagnostic tool to read error codes and analyze live data from your engine’s computer.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We perform targeted tests on components like sensors, fuel system, and ignition to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the necessary repairs and re-scan the system to ensure the problem is resolved.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We’ll diagnose the specific code and recommend the appropriate repair.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose intermittent problems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate driving conditions and use advanced tools to capture intermittent issues. Our experience helps us track down tricky problems.

services.title: Tire Services & Alignment
services.shortDescription: Extend tire life and improve handling with professional mounting, balancing, and alignment.
services.longDescription: Proper tire care is essential for safety, fuel efficiency, and ride comfort. We offer tire mounting, balancing, rotation, and precision alignment using state-of-the-art equipment. Whether you need new tires or just a alignment check, our team ensures your tires wear evenly and your vehicle tracks straight.
benefits: Longer tire life and better fuel economy
Prevents uneven wear and premature replacement
We can source tires for any make and model

process.title: Tire Inspection
process.description: We check tread depth, tire pressure, and overall condition for damage or wear patterns.

process.title: Mount & Balance
process.description: We mount new tires on your rims and balance them to eliminate vibrations.

process.title: Alignment Check
process.description: We measure camber, caster, and toe angles and adjust them to factory specifications.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Tire rotation is recommended every 5,000 to 7,500 miles to ensure even wear. We can do it during your oil change.

faqs.question: Do I need an alignment if I’m not pulling to one side?
faqs.answer: Even if your car drives straight, alignment can be off and cause uneven wear. We recommend checking alignment annually or when installing new tires.

about.headline: Over 35 Years of Honest Auto Repair in Dallas
about.mission: To provide Dallas drivers with dependable, transparent auto repair services that keep their vehicles safe and reliable — without the upselling or surprises.
story: R & B Automotive was founded in 1988 by two lifelong friends who believed in doing the right thing, even when no one was watching. Starting as a small two-bay shop on Corinth Street, they built a reputation for honest diagnostics and fair pricing. Over the decades, the business grew through word-of-mouth as generations of Dallas families trusted us with their cars.

Today, R & B Automotive remains family-owned and operated. Our team of ASE-certified technicians continues the tradition of quality workmanship and personalized service. We invest in the latest tools and training so we can handle everything from classic cars to modern hybrids. When you bring your vehicle to us, you’re not just a customer — you’re part of the R&B family.

highlight.label: Average Rating from Hundreds of Reviews

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend repairs you don’t need. Our estimates are detailed and transparent.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: Continuous training and certification ensure we stay ahead of automotive technology.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to serve our Dallas neighbors and support local causes.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with solid warranties and a commitment to get it right the first time.
